title: Compact Core, Extended Reach: A Bipolar kpc-Scale Elongation in a Little Red Dot at $z \approx 5.5$
summary: Little Red Dots (LRDs) appear extremely compact at rest-frame optical wavelengths, yet many show extended rest-frame UV morphology revealing more complex internal structure. We present a combined analysis of VLT/MUSE rest-frame UV integral-field spectroscopy and continuum-subtracted [O III], H$β$, and H$α$+[N II] emission-line maps from JWST/NIRCam imaging at sub-kpc resolution for LRD-204851 at $z=5.482$ in GOODS-S. We find that LRD-204851 hosts a remarkably thin, bipolar, elongated structure passing through the optical continuum centroid and extending several kpc on either side, traced by both the UV continuum and the rest-frame optical emission lines, with a bright [O III] clump-like structure $\sim$2 kpc to the south-east of the centroid. The MUSE observations reveal a double-peaked Ly$α$ profile, with a broad and bright near-systemic red peak and a relatively faint peak blueshifted by $\sim$430 km s$^{-1}$, accompanied by a tentative N V $λ1238$ detection at similar velocity. In narrow-band imaging extracted from the MUSE IFU cube, both the blue Ly$α$ peak and the tentative N V emission lean toward this same south-eastern direction. Independently, radiative-transfer modeling of the integrated Ly$α$ profile favors a biconical low-column-density cavity in a dense, slowly expanding neutral envelope, in support of the bipolar geometry traced by the line maps. Together, these results suggest that the elongated emission of LRD-204851 is connected to radiation and/or gas flow from its central engine through a low-column-density channel with a small opening angle that may trace either a slow outflow or a quasi-static ionization cone. LRD-204851 is one of the first LRDs where the central engine's impact on its host galaxy is potentially directly observable on kpc scales.

AI.tldr: LRD-204851（红点源）在5.482红移处显示出由中心引擎驱动的细长双极结构，通过紫外连续谱和光学发射线在kpc尺度上可见，Lyα辐射转移建模支持双锥低柱密度空洞结构。
AI.motivation: Little Red Dots（LRDs）在静止光学波段呈致密点源，但静止紫外波段却显示扩展结构，揭示其内部存在更复杂的结构特征，需要高分辨率观测来揭示其物理本质。
AI.method: 结合VLT/MUSE积分场光谱（Lyα、N V）和JWST/NIRCam窄带成像（[O III]、Hβ、Hα+[N II]），在亚kpc分辨率下对z=5.482的LRD-204851进行综合分析与辐射转移建模。
AI.result: 发现LRD-204851存在极薄的双极细长结构，从光学连续谱中心向两侧延伸数kpc；Lyα呈双峰轮廓（红峰宽亮、蓝峰弱且蓝移~430 km/s）；[O III]团块结构位于中心东南约2 kpc处；N V λ1238在相似速度处被探测到；辐射转移模型支持双锥低柱密度通道。
AI.conclusion: LRD-204851的细长发射结构与其中心引擎通过低柱密度小张角通道产生的辐射和/或气体流出有关，可能对应慢速外流或准静态电离锥，是首批在kpc尺度上直接观测到中心引擎对宿主星系影响的LRD之一。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 小红点（LRDs）在静止光学波长上显得极为致密，但许多在静止紫外波段表现出延展形态，揭示了更复杂的内部结构。我们结合VLT/MUSE静止紫外积分场光谱和JWST/NIRCam成像在亚千秒差距分辨率下的连续谱减除[O III]、Hβ和Hα+[N II]发射线图，对GOODS-S中红移z=5.482的LRD-204851进行了分析。我们发现LRD-204851拥有一个非常细长、双极、延展的结构，穿过光学连续谱质心，两侧延伸数kpc，由紫外连续谱和静止光学发射线共同示踪，并在质心东南约2 kpc处有一个明亮的[O III]团块状结构。MUSE观测显示双峰Lyα轮廓，具有宽而明亮的近系统红峰和蓝移约430 km/s的相对微弱蓝峰，同时伴有类似速度的N V λ1238疑似探测。从MUSE IFU数据立方体提取的窄带成像中，蓝Lyα峰和疑似N V发射均倾向于同一东南方向。独立地，对积分Lyα轮廓的辐射转移模型支持在致密、缓慢膨胀的中性包层中存在双锥低柱密度空腔，与发射线图揭示的双极几何结构一致。这些结果表明，LRD-204851的延展发射与其中心引擎通过低柱密度小张角通道产生的辐射和/或气体流出有关，可能对应慢速外流或准静态电离锥。LRD-204851是首批在kpc尺度上直接观测到中心引擎对宿主星系影响的LRD之一。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：LRD-204851的细长发射结构与其中心引擎通过低柱密度小张角通道产生的辐射和/或气体流出有关，可能对应慢速外流或准静态电离锥，是首批在kpc尺度上直接观测到中心引擎对宿主星系影响的LRD之一。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: NIRCam imaging and NIRSpec/PRISM spectrum of LRD-204851 at z sys = 5.482 z_{sys}=5.482 . Top row: Three NIRCam RGB cutouts at the native resolution, all shown with a common linear stretch. The left panel uses three continuum filters; the middle panel highlights [O iii ]+H β \beta ; and the right panel highlights H α \alpha +[N ii ] in green. The target is a compact red point source in F460M, but shows a remarkably elongated blue continuum extension from southeast to northwest, as well as complex structures in optical emission lines. Bottom: NIRSpec/PRISM spectrum (MSA shuttle is shown in the inset). The blue and red solid lines show the rest-UV and rest-optical continuum power laws, respectively. The characteristic “V-shaped” continuum identifies LRD-204851 as a Little Red Dot, and higher-resolution spectra confirm that its H α \alpha emission includes a broad component with FWHM > 1000 ​ km ​ s − 1 {FWHM}>1000~{km~s^{-1}} (Matthee et al. , 2024 ; Juodžbalis et al. , 2026 ; Matthee et al. , 2026 ) ; these spectra are not shown here.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：LRD-204851在z_sys=5.482的NIRCam成像和NIRSpec/PRISM光谱。顶行：三个NIRCam RGB剪裁图，原始分辨率，均采用相同线性拉伸。左图使用三个连续谱滤光片；中图突出显示[O III]+Hβ；右图突出显示Hα+[N II]（绿色）。目标在F460M中是一个致密红点源，但显示出从东南到西北的显著延展蓝色连续谱延伸，以及光学发射线中的复杂结构。底行：NIRSpec/PRISM光谱（插图显示MSA快门）。蓝色和红色实线分别表示静止紫外和静止光学连续谱幂律。特征性的“V形”连续谱将LRD-204851识别为小红点，更高分辨率光谱确认其Hα发射包含FWHM>1000 km/s的宽成分（Matthee等人，2024；Juodžbalis等人，2026；Matthee等人，2026）；这些光谱未在此显示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Left: MUSE spectrum (black) of the Ly α \alpha region with the Bicone_X_Slab_Out best-fit model (orange) overlaid. The cyan, red, and pink bands mark the disjoint windows used to build the blue-component, red-core, and red-wing narrow-band maps (see Section III.3 ). The lower sub-panel shows the fit residuals with ± 1 ​ σ \pm 1\sigma (grey band) and ± 3 ​ σ \pm 3\sigma (dashed) reference levels. The full posterior is shown in Appendix B . Right: MUSE spectrum around N v λ \lambda 1238, with the raw flux (light grey) overlaid by a 1.5-pixel (i.e., ≈ \approx 1.8Å) Gaussian-smoothed version (black) and its propagated ± 1 ​ σ \pm 1\sigma band. The arrow marks the tentative 2.1 ​ σ 2.1\sigma N v λ \lambda 1238 detection.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：左图：MUSE光谱（黑色）显示Lyα区域，叠加Bicone_X_Slab_Out最佳拟合模型（橙色）。青色、红色和粉色带标记用于构建蓝成分、红核和红翼窄带图的不相交窗口（见第III.3节）。下方子图显示拟合残差，带有±1σ（灰色带）和±3σ（虚线）参考水平。完整后验分布见附录B。右图：MUSE光谱围绕N V λ1238，原始流量（浅灰色）叠加1.5像素（即约1.8Å）高斯平滑版本（黑色）及其传播的±1σ带。箭头标记疑似2.1σ N V λ1238探测。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: MUSE narrow-band maps of the multi-component Ly α \alpha emission and the tentative N v λ ​ 1238 \lambda 1238 detection in LRD-204851. From left to right: the blue Ly α \alpha component, the red Ly α \alpha core, the red Ly α \alpha wing, and the N v λ ​ 1238 \lambda 1238 narrow-band map. Per-panel color stretches saturate at the 99.5th percentile and use a lower limit of 1 ​ σ 1\sigma for the displayed map, so structures below the noise level fade to white. The black dashed contour shows the boundary of the Ly α \alpha segmentation map from the MUSE HUDF release and is identical in every panel; the thin black crosshairs mark the NIRCam/F460M continuum centroid.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：LRD-204851中多成分Lyα发射和疑似N V λ1238探测的MUSE窄带图。从左到右：蓝Lyα成分、红Lyα核、红Lyα翼和N V λ1238窄带图。每面板颜色拉伸饱和于99.5百分位，显示地图下限为1σ，因此低于噪声水平的结构渐变为白色。黑色虚线轮廓显示MUSE HUDF发布中Lyα分割图的边界，每个面板相同；细黑色十字准线标记NIRCam/F460M连续谱质心。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Optical emission-line maps of LRD-204851 constructed using NIRCam imaging. From left to right: [O III] , H α \alpha + [N II] , and H β \beta . The top row shows the maps alone; the bottom row overlays the MUSE red (magenta) and blue (cyan) Ly α \alpha component contours and the tentative N v λ ​ 1238 \lambda 1238 contour (green dashed), with the NIRCam/F460M continuum centroid marked by the blue × \times . All panels share a common color scale of line flux per pixel.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：使用NIRCam成像构建的LRD-204851光学发射线图。从左到右：[O III]、Hα+[N II]和Hβ。顶行仅显示地图；底行叠加MUSE红（品红色）和蓝（青色）Lyα成分轮廓以及疑似N V λ1238轮廓（绿色虚线），NIRCam/F460M连续谱质心用蓝色×标记。所有面板共享每像素线流量的共同颜色标度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Azimuthally averaged radial surface-brightness profiles of the optical emission-line maps in LRD-204851 (Figure 4 ), normalized by the central-annulus value. The black dashed curve shows the radial profile of the PSF, and the gray shaded region marks the scale of the PSF’s FWHM / 2 {FWHM}/2 . The bottom panel shows the relative difference from the PSF. The H α \alpha + [N II] profile tracks the PSF within r ≲ 0.15 ′′ r\lesssim 0.15^{\prime\prime} , while the [O III] profile lies above the PSF, indicating a more extended light distribution than H α \alpha + [N II] .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：LRD-204851光学发射线图（图4）的方位角平均径向表面亮度轮廓，归一化至中心环值。黑色虚线曲线显示PSF的径向轮廓，灰色阴影区域标记PSF的FWHM/2尺度。底图显示与PSF的相对差异。Hα+[N II]轮廓在r≲0.15″内追踪PSF，而[O III]轮廓位于PSF之上，表明其光分布比Hα+[N II]更延展。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Map of the line ratio log 10 ⁡ ( [O III] / H ​ α + [N II] ) \log_{10}(\mbox{[{O~III}]}\,/\,{H}\alpha\!+\!\mbox{[{N~II}]}) in LRD-204851, derived from the line maps shown in Figure 4 . Pixels are masked where either line has S/N < 3 <3 . Overlaid contours show the MUSE blue Ly α \alpha component and the tentative N v λ ​ 1238 \lambda 1238 emission, as in Figure 4 .
figures.caption_zh: 图6：LRD-204851中线比log10([O III]/Hα+[N II])的图，源自图4所示的线图。像素在任一线S/N<3时被掩蔽。叠加轮廓显示MUSE蓝Lyα成分和疑似N V λ1238发射，如图4所示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: MUSE-to-NIRCam astrometric correction. Left : PDF of the per-source offsets for reference sources before (top) and after (bottom) correction. Right : 2-D astrometric residuals; the red dashed ellipse marks ± \pm 1 mean absolute deviation (MAD) about the median. After correction both medians are zero.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：MUSE到NIRCam的天体测量校正。左图：校正前（顶部）和校正后（底部）参考源每源偏移的PDF。右图：二维天体测量残差；红色虚线椭圆标记中位数周围±1平均绝对偏差（MAD）。校正后两个中位数均为零。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: Joint and marginal posterior distributions for the four sampled parameters, z Ly ​ α z_{Ly\alpha} , log ⁡ V exp \log V_{exp} , log ⁡ N HI \log N_{HI} , and log ⁡ τ a \log\tau_{a} , under the Bicone_X_Slab_Out geometry, which best reproduces the observed Ly α \alpha profile of LRD-204851.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：在Bicone_X_Slab_Out几何结构下，四个采样参数z_Lyα、log V_exp、log N_HI和log τ_a的联合和边缘后验分布，该结构最佳再现LRD-204851的观测Lyα轮廓。

title: IllustrisTNG50 angular momentum maps: tracing the morpho-kinematic evolution of galaxies
comment: 20 pages, 15 figures, submitted to a&a, comments are welcome, modified abstract to fit Arxiv requirements
summary: Following the first observational study of the two-dimensional spatial distribution of stellar specific angular momentum (sAM) in late-type galaxies, we quantify the morpho-kinematic diversity of galaxy simulations using the newly proposed j-types classification. We analyse the stellar sAM surface density (sAMSD) of $\sim$8000 TNG50 stellar discs spanning $0 \leq z \leq 3.5$ and $9.5 \leq \log(M_\star/\mathrm{M}_\odot) \leq 11.2$, selected from the TNG50 MW/M31 parent sample. We characterize their j-substructures using four morpho-kinematic metrics derived from comparisons with the Freeman sAMSD distribution and the Fourier decomposition of the galaxies in the sAMSD space. A Gaussian mixture model with four fully covariant components assigns each galaxy a probability of belonging to one of four j-types. We find that TNG50 discs exhibit a morpho-kinematic diversity consistent with observations, redistributing stellar angular momentum through four dominant j-substructures that evolve with redshift as follows: j-irregulars ($\bar{z}=0.91$), j-spirals ($\bar{z}=0.76$), j-rings ($\bar{z}=0.62$), and j-bars ($\bar{z}=0.39$). The gas fraction and stellar rotational support ($V/σ$) drive this evolution: gas-rich galaxies preferentially host j-irregulars and j-spirals, whereas gas-poor systems favour j-rings and j-bars. At fixed gas fraction, higher $V/σ$ favours j-spirals and j-rings, respectively. We conclude that there is a canonical pathway for the redistribution of angular momentum within galactic discs undergoing secular evolution in TNG50, accessible only through their morpho-kinematic description. The sAMSD analysis links variations in stellar dynamics to their consequences for mass redistribution, enabling the reconstruction of comprehensive galactic evolutionary histories.

AI.tldr: 本文利用TNG50模拟中约8000个盘星系样本，基于恒星比角动量面密度（sAMSD）分析，提出j-类型分类法，将星系分为四类（不规则、旋涡、环、棒），发现其演化受气体比例和旋转支撑主导，揭示了星系盘长期演化中角动量再分配的经典路径。
AI.motivation: 继晚型星系恒星比角动量二维空间分布的首个观测研究之后，本文旨在利用新提出的j-类型分类法，量化星系模拟中的形态-运动学多样性。
AI.method: 从TNG50 MW/M31母样本中选取约8000个恒星盘（红移0-3.5，恒星质量9.5-11.2），通过Freeman分布对比和傅里叶分解提取四个形态-运动学指标，再使用四分量全协方差高斯混合模型将每个星系分配到四种j-类型。
AI.result: TNG50盘星系表现出与观测一致的形态-运动学多样性，四种j-子结构平均红移分别为：j-不规则（0.91）、j-旋涡（0.76）、j-环（0.62）、j-棒（0.39）。气体比例和旋转支撑驱动演化：富气星系倾向于j-不规则和j-旋涡，贫气星系倾向于j-环和j-棒。
AI.conclusion: 星系盘在长期演化中存在角动量再分配的经典路径，该路径仅能通过形态-运动学描述揭示。sAMSD分析将恒星动力学变化与质量再分配联系起来，有助于重建完整的星系演化历史。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 继对晚型星系恒星比角动量（sAM）二维空间分布的首次观测研究之后，我们利用新提出的j型分类法量化了星系模拟中的形态-运动学多样性。我们分析了从TNG50 MW/M31母样本中选出的约8000个TNG50恒星盘（覆盖0 ≤ z ≤ 3.5和9.5 ≤ log(M_⋆/M_⊙) ≤ 11.2）的恒星sAM面密度（sAMSD）。通过四种形态-运动学指标（源自与Freeman sAMSD分布的比较以及星系在sAMSD空间中的傅里叶分解）来刻画其j子结构。一个包含四个全协方差分量的高斯混合模型为每个星系分配了属于四种j型之一的概率。我们发现TNG50盘展现出与观测一致的形态-运动学多样性，通过四种主导的j子结构重新分布恒星角动量，这些子结构随红移演化如下：j不规则型（平均红移=0.91）、j旋涡型（平均红移=0.76）、j环型（平均红移=0.62）和j棒型（平均红移=0.39）。气体分数和恒星旋转支撑（V/σ）驱动了这一演化：富气星系优先拥有j不规则型和j旋涡型，而贫气星系则倾向于j环型和j棒型。在固定气体分数下，较高的V/σ分别有利于j旋涡型和j环型。我们得出结论：在TNG50中，经历长期演化的星系盘内存在角动量再分配的经典路径，该路径仅能通过其形态-运动学描述来揭示。sAMSD分析将恒星动力学变化与其对质量再分配的影响联系起来，从而能够重建全面的星系演化历史。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：星系盘在长期演化中存在角动量再分配的经典路径，该路径仅能通过形态-运动学描述揭示。sAMSD分析将恒星动力学变化与质量再分配联系起来，有助于重建完整的星系演化历史。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Face-on (top) and edge-on (bottom) view of Σ ⋆ \Sigma_{\star} (left), v ⋆ θ v_{\star\theta} (middle), and ι ⋆ \iota_{\star} (right) for the galaxy with the highest j ⋆ j_{\star} of our sample. The SubHaloID and the 5 kpc length scale are located at the top and bottom left of all face-on maps, respectively, while the redshift corresponding to the snapshot is located at the bottom right of the face-on Σ ⋆ \Sigma_{\star} .

The grey histogram in the background of the top panel shows the percentage of galaxies within each redshift bin. A minimum of five galaxies per bin was ensured throughout the analysis. The x-axis and y-axis show the total stellar mass and total stellar sAM, respectively. Each sAMSD map representing a morpho-kinematic class corresponds to the galaxy with the minimum Euclidean distance to the associated GMM centroid in the scaled four-dimensional parameter space, and is centred on its corresponding M ⋆ M_{\star} and j ⋆ j_{\star} values. The value of redshift, corresponding to the mean redshift from each class, is shown below the label indicating its j ⋆ j_{\star} -type. title: Searching for a superdisk in radio galaxy J0116-473
summary: Superdisks have emerged as an active area of research in recent years, and J0116-473 represents a promising target for studying this extended structure. Our primary objective was to search for HI absorption associated with the suspected superdisk. However, no such absorption feature was detected, suggesting a low, or absence of neutral hydrogen content in the superdisk. In addition, we examined a compact point source located near the galaxy's core and the presumed plane of the superdisk, enabling us to search for HI absorption against this background continuum. We also present a detailed multi-band morphological analysis of the galaxy using Giant Metrewave Radio Telescope (GMRT) observations in Bands 3, 4, and 5. A spectral analysis of both the galaxy and the nearby point source was carried out using data from these three frequency bands. A systematic steepening of the spectral index is observed from the core toward the lobes, as expected for aging synchrotron-emitting plasma. We also found that the northern inner lobe exhibits a significantly steeper spectrum than its southern counterpart, possibly reflecting environmental effects associated with the proposed superdisk. Since superdisks are expected to contain hot, ionized gas, we additionally examined archival X-ray observations from the XMM-Newton telescope. Although diffuse X-ray emission associated with the radio lobes is visible, no significant emission is detected from the region corresponding to the suspected superdisk.

AI.tldr: 本文对J0116-473星系进行多波段观测，未在疑似超级盘中发现HI吸收或明显X射线发射，但观测到从核心到瓣的谱指数系统性变陡，且北内瓣比南内瓣谱指数更陡，可能与超级盘的环境效应有关。
AI.motivation: 超级盘是近年研究热点，J0116-473被认为是有希望研究该扩展结构的目标，因此作者希望通过观测验证其相关物理性质。
AI.method: 使用GMRT在Band 3、4、5进行HI吸收搜索和多波段形态分析，结合XMM-Newton的X射线观测；同时分析星系和邻近点源的频谱特性。
AI.result: 未检测到HI吸收特征；从核心到瓣谱指数系统性变陡；北内瓣谱指数比南内瓣显著更陡；X射线未在超级盘区域探测到显著发射。
AI.conclusion: 超级盘中中性氢含量很低或不存在；谱指数差异可能反映超级盘的环境效应；超级盘可能主要包含热电离气体而非中性氢或显著X射线发射物质。

recommendation.reason: 论文主题为射电星系J0116-473中的超级盘HI吸收和X射线观测，与用户Zotero库中强引力透镜、暗物质、尘埃、恒星形成星系、JWST等核心主题无直接关联；方法上使用GMRT和XMM-Newton，而非用户常用的ALMA、JWST等；作者列表中无用户核心作者（如Tommaso Treu、G C Jones等）。仅射电星系和谱指数等泛泛重叠，不足以支撑高评分。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 超级盘近年来已成为一个活跃的研究领域，J0116-473是研究这种扩展结构的一个有前景的目标。我们的主要目标是搜索与疑似超级盘相关的HI吸收。然而，未检测到此类吸收特征，表明超级盘中中性氢含量很低或不存在。此外，我们检查了位于星系核心附近和假定超级盘平面内的一个致密点源，从而能够搜索针对该背景连续谱的HI吸收。我们还利用巨米波射电望远镜（GMRT）在波段3、4和5的观测，对星系进行了详细的多波段形态分析。使用这三个频段的数据对星系和附近的点源进行了光谱分析。从核心向瓣区观察到光谱指数系统性变陡，这与老化的同步辐射等离子体预期一致。我们还发现，北内侧瓣的光谱明显比南内侧瓣更陡，这可能反映了与所提出的超级盘相关的环境效应。由于超级盘预计包含热电离气体，我们还检查了XMM-牛顿望远镜的档案X射线观测。尽管可以看到与射电瓣相关的弥散X射线发射，但在疑似超级盘对应的区域未检测到显著发射。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的结论：超级盘中中性氢含量很低或不存在；谱指数差异可能反映超级盘的环境效应；超级盘可能主要包含热电离气体而非中性氢或显著X射线发射物质。

title: The Lumina Project: Intergalactic Clumping and Recombination Sinks
comment: 23 pages, 15 figures, 2 tables. Submitted to OJA. Please visit https://lumina-simulation.com for more details
summary: Recombinations during the Epoch of Reionization are intrinsically inhomogeneous, with different regions of the intergalactic medium contributing unevenly depending on their density, temperature, ionization state, and spatial patchiness. We combine the high- and medium-resolution 95.5 cMpc Thesan-1 andh Thesan-2 runs with the significantly larger 500 cMpc Lumina simulation to measure clumping factors and recombination rates consistently across different resolutions and box sizes. We consider the standard ionized hydrogen clumping factor, $C_{\rm HII} \equiv \langle n_{\rm HII}^2\rangle/\langle n_{\rm HII}\rangle^2$, and a recombination-weighted clumping factor, $C_{\rm rec}$. Despite differences in resolution, volume, and reionization history, the simulations show an approximately universal clumping evolution at the 10-20% level when parametrized by the global ionized fraction $x_{\rm HII}$ rather than by redshift. Across all simulations, $C_{\rm rec}$ remains systematically below $C_{\rm HII}$, with the discrepancy increasing toward lower redshift as photoheating suppresses recombinations. In \lumina, the density-only prescription overpredicts the instantaneous recombination rate by factors of 1.29 at $z\approx8$ and 1.84 at $z\approx5$, and the cumulative recombination count by a factor of 1.45 by $z\approx5$. Mapping the recombination budget in the joint overdensity-temperature plane reveals that the dominant recombination ridges closely follow simple analytic thermal equilibrium bands. Finally, we introduce a phase-space recombination integral and define a phase-space clumping factor, $C_{\rm ps}(Δ,T)$, which isolates the intrinsic recombination enhancement associated with ionization structure and thermal state at fixed overdensity and temperature.

AI.tldr: 本研究结合Thesan和Lumina模拟，发现再电离时期的重组因子在全局电离分数参数化下具有近似普适性（10-20%精度），并提出了新的相空间重组因子以分离电离结构和热状态对重组的贡献。
AI.motivation: 再电离时期的重组过程本质上是非均匀的，不同密度、温度、电离状态和空间分布的IGM区域贡献差异显著。现有模拟在分辨率和体积上存在差异，需要统一框架来测量和理解重组因子的演化。
AI.method: 结合Thesan-1（95.5 cMpc，高/中分辨率）、Thesan-2和Lumina（500 cMpc）模拟，计算标准电离氢重组因子C_HII和重组加权因子C_rec，并在全局电离分数x_HII而非红移参数化下比较；引入相空间重组积分和相空间重组因子C_ps(Δ,T)。
AI.result: 1）在x_HII参数化下，不同模拟的重组因子演化在10-20%内近似普适；2）C_rec始终低于C_HII，差异随红移降低而增大；3）Lumina中纯密度方法在z≈8和z≈5高估瞬时重组率1.29和1.84倍，累计重组数高估1.45倍；4）主导重组脊线遵循简单解析热平衡带；5）提出相空间重组因子可分离电离结构和热状态的贡献。
AI.conclusion: 再电离时期重组因子具有近似普适性，但需考虑热反馈抑制效应；纯密度方法会显著高估重组率；相空间重组因子为更精确建模提供了新工具。

recommendation.reason: 论文涉及再电离时期的重组过程，与用户兴趣中的星际介质（intergalactic medium）主题匹配，且作者中包含用户核心作者Mark Vogelsberger、Xuejian Shen和Lars Hernquist。但论文主题（再电离重组）与用户主要关注的暗物质、强引力透镜、尘埃、恒星形成星系等核心主题关联较弱，因此评分适中。
recommendation.topic_fit: 论文主题为再电离时期的重组因子，与用户兴趣中的星际介质（intergalactic medium）有一定关联，但与暗物质、强引力透镜、尘埃、恒星形成星系等核心主题匹配度较低。
recommendation.method_fit: 论文使用Thesan和Lumina模拟，属于宇宙学模拟方法，与用户兴趣中的模拟方法（如ALMA、JWST观测）不完全一致，但模拟方法在用户兴趣中也有一定体现。
recommendation.author_fit: 论文作者中包含用户核心作者Mark Vogelsberger、Xuejian Shen和Lars Hernquist，匹配度较高。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 论文提出相空间重组因子，具有一定新颖性，但整体主题与用户兴趣的匹配度有限。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文主题（再电离重组）与用户主要关注的暗物质、强引力透镜、尘埃、恒星形成星系等核心主题关联较弱，且方法（宇宙学模拟）与用户常用的观测方法（如ALMA、JWST）不完全一致。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 再电离时期的复合过程本质上是非均匀的，不同区域的星系间介质因其密度、温度、电离状态和空间斑块性而对复合的贡献不均。我们结合高、中分辨率的95.5 cMpc Thesan-1和Thesan-2模拟与显著更大的500 cMpc Lumina模拟，在不同分辨率和盒子尺寸下一致地测量团块因子和复合速率。我们考虑了标准的电离氢团块因子 $C_{\rm HII} \equiv \langle n_{\rm HII}^2\rangle/\langle n_{\rm HII}\rangle^2$ 和一个复合加权的团块因子 $C_{\rm rec}$。尽管分辨率、体积和再电离历史存在差异，但当以全局电离分数 $x_{\rm HII}$ 而非红移为参数时，模拟显示团块演化在10-20%水平上近似普适。在所有模拟中，$C_{\rm rec}$ 始终低于 $C_{\rm HII}$，且随着红移降低，光加热抑制复合，差异增大。在Lumina中，纯密度方法在 $z\approx8$ 和 $z\approx5$ 时分别高估瞬时复合速率1.29倍和1.84倍，到 $z\approx5$ 时累积复合计数高估1.45倍。在联合过密度-温度平面上绘制复合预算显示，主导复合脊线紧密遵循简单的解析热平衡带。最后，我们引入了一个相空间复合积分，并定义了一个相空间团块因子 $C_{\rm ps}(Δ,T)$，该因子在固定过密度和温度下隔离了与电离结构和热状态相关的内在复合增强。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论如下：再电离时期重组因子具有近似普适性，但需考虑热反馈抑制效应；纯密度方法会显著高估重组率；相空间重组因子为更精确建模提供了新工具。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Simulation properties for the lumina (Zier et al. , 2026 ) and thesan (Kannan et al. , 2022a ; Garaldi et al. , 2024 ) runs used in this work. Columns list the comoving box size ( L box L_{\text{box}} ), the initial gas and dark-matter resolution-element counts ( N part N_{part} ), the baryonic and dark-matter mass resolutions ( m b m_{b} , m dm m_{dm} ), the comoving Plummer-equivalent dark-matter softening and the minimum gas softening ( ϵ dm \epsilon_{dm} , ϵ gas , min \epsilon_{gas,min} ), and the final redshift ( z final z_{final} ).
figures.caption_zh: 表1：本工作中使用的lumina（Zier等人，2026年）和thesan（Kannan等人，2022a；Garaldi等人，2024年）模拟的模拟属性。列列出了共动盒子尺寸（L_box）、初始气体和暗物质分辨率元素计数（N_part）、重子和暗物质质量分辨率（m_b、m_dm）、共动Plummer等效暗物质软化和最小气体软化（ϵ_dm、ϵ_gas,min）以及最终红移（z_final）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Real-space view of the intergalactic medium at z = 7 z=7 in lumina , showing overdensity, clumping factor 𝒞 100 \mathcal{C}_{100} defined in Eq. ( 2 ) evaluated within a local smoothing volume, temperature, and ionized fraction x HII x_{{HII}} . The maps are projected through the same slice and then smoothed on a common 3.125 ​ cMpc 3.125\,{cMpc} scale. Colors show raw projected field values with each panel independently normalized to display its dynamic range. Dense regions correspond to enhanced clumping, while the temperature map reveals the ∼ 10 4 ​ K \sim 10^{4}\,{K} photoheated phase, and the ionization field traces the inhomogeneous progression of reionization. This visualization illustrates the spatial origin of recombination sinks and their connection to the underlying density and thermal structure, which are analyzed quantitatively in the following sections.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：lumina中z=7时星系间介质的实空间视图，显示过密度、团块因子𝒞_100（根据方程(2)在局部平滑体积内评估）、温度和电离分数x_HII。这些图通过同一切片投影，然后在共同的3.125 cMpc尺度上平滑。颜色显示原始投影场值，每个面板独立归一化以显示其动态范围。密集区域对应增强的团块，而温度图揭示了约10^4 K的光加热相，电离场追踪了再电离的非均匀进程。该可视化说明了复合汇的空间起源及其与底层密度和热结构的联系，这些将在后续章节中进行定量分析。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Top panel: Evolution of global clumping factors for gas with overdensity Δ < 100 \Delta<100 in thesan-1 , thesan-2 , and lumina , plotted as a function of logarithmic redshift. The redshift axis follows the convention used throughout the paper, with high redshift on the right. Solid curves show the recombination-weighted clumping factor 𝒞 rec \mathcal{C}_{rec} , while dashed curves show the density-only clumping factor 𝒞 H ​ ii \mathcal{C}_{{\text{H}\,\textsc{ii}}} . Bottom panel: The same clumping curves plotted as a function of the global H ii fraction, using the simulation-specific reionization histories to map ( z → x H ​ ii ) (z\rightarrow x_{{\text{H}\,\textsc{ii}}}) . Expressed in this form, the three simulations agree at the ∼ 10 \sim 10 – 20 % 20\% level over most of the reionization history. The inset highlights the late stages of reionization ( x H ​ ii ≳ 0.5 x_{{\text{H}\,\textsc{ii}}}\gtrsim 0.5 ). The ratio region within the bottom panel shows the clumping factors in thesan-1 and thesan-2 relative to lumina ; both 𝒞 rec \mathcal{C}_{rec} (solid) and 𝒞 H ​ ii \mathcal{C}_{{\text{H}\,\textsc{ii}}} (dashed) remain within ∼ 10 \sim 10 – 20 % 20\% of the lumina values over most of the reionization history. Appendix C gives compact power-law fits to these relations.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：上方面板：thesan-1、thesan-2和lumina中过密度Δ<100的气体的全局团块因子演化，作为对数红移的函数绘制。红移轴遵循本文使用的惯例，高红移在右侧。实线显示复合加权团块因子𝒞_rec，而虚线显示纯密度团块因子𝒞_H ii。下方面板：相同的团块曲线作为全局H ii分数的函数绘制，使用模拟特定的再电离历史映射(z→x_H ii)。以这种形式表示，三个模拟在再电离历史的大部分时间内以约10–20%的水平一致。插图突出显示了再电离的后期阶段（x_H ii≳0.5）。下方面板内的比率区域显示了thesan-1和thesan-2相对于lumina的团块因子；𝒞_rec（实线）和𝒞_H ii（虚线）在再电离历史的大部分时间内保持在lumina值的约10–20%以内。附录C给出了这些关系的紧凑幂律拟合。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Top: Volume-averaged recombination rate density in the three simulations. Solid (dashed) curves correspond to the 𝒞 rec \mathcal{C}_{\text{rec}} ( 𝒞 H ii \mathcal{C}_{\text{{\text{H}\,{ii}}}} ) prescriptions. All models show a broad maximum in recombination rate around z ∼ 8 z\sim 8 – 10 10 , followed by a decline toward z ∼ 5 z\sim 5 . In lumina , the 𝒞 H ii \mathcal{C}_{\text{{\text{H}\,{ii}}}} -based rate exceeds the 𝒞 rec \mathcal{C}_{\text{rec}} rate by factors of 1.29 1.29 at z ≃ 8 z\simeq 8 and 1.84 1.84 at z ≃ 5 z\simeq 5 . Among the simulations, thesan-1 reaches the highest peak rate, followed by thesan-2 , with lumina lowest. Bottom: The same recombination rates plotted against H ii fraction. Unlike the clumping factors, the recombination-rate curves do not collapse across simulations. This indicates that matching x H ​ ii x_{{\text{H}\,\textsc{ii}}} and 𝒞 rec \mathcal{C}_{rec} does not fix the density term in Γ rec ∝ 𝒞 rec ​ ⟨ n H ​ ii ⟩ V 2 \Gamma_{rec}\propto\mathcal{C}_{rec}\langle n_{{\text{H}\,\textsc{ii}}}\rangle_{V}^{2} . The higher thesan-1 values are consistent with denser ionized gas being sampled, e.g., an earlier reionization history combined with more resolved radiation sources and sinks.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：上方：三个模拟中的体积平均复合速率密度。实线（虚线）曲线对应𝒞_rec（𝒞_H ii）方案。所有模型在z∼8–10附近显示复合速率的宽峰，随后向z∼5下降。在lumina中，基于𝒞_H ii的速率在z≃8和z≃5时分别超过𝒞_rec速率1.29倍和1.84倍。在模拟中，thesan-1达到最高峰值速率，其次是thesan-2，lumina最低。下方：相同的复合速率相对于H ii分数绘制。与团块因子不同，复合速率曲线在模拟之间不重叠。这表明匹配x_H ii和𝒞_rec并不能固定Γ_rec∝𝒞_rec⟨n_H ii⟩_V^2中的密度项。thesan-1的较高值与更密集的电离气体被采样一致，例如更早的再电离历史结合更多解析的辐射源和汇。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Top: Number of recombinations per hydrogen atom per Hubble time, N rec N_{\text{rec}} , as a function of redshift for the three simulations. Solid and dashed curves correspond to the 𝒞 rec \mathcal{C}_{\text{rec}} and 𝒞 H ii \mathcal{C}_{\text{{\text{H}\,{ii}}}} prescriptions, respectively. Values grow from ≪ 1 \ll 1 at high redshift to several recombinations per atom by z ≃ 6 z\simeq 6 . For lumina , the density-only value exceeds the temperature-weighted value by factors of 1.29 1.29 at z ≃ 8 z\simeq 8 and 1.84 1.84 at z ≃ 5 z\simeq 5 . Bottom: The same per-Hubble-time recombination counts plotted as a function of H ii fraction. As with the instantaneous rates, the curves do not overlap across simulations. The ionization-fraction parametrization removes much of the difference in clumping growth but does not eliminate differences tied to the density of ionized gas.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：上方：每个氢原子每个哈勃时间的复合数N_rec，作为三个模拟的红移函数。实线和虚线分别对应𝒞_rec和𝒞_H ii方案。值从高红移时的≪1增长到z≃6时的每个原子几次复合。对于lumina，纯密度值在z≃8和z≃5时分别超过温度加权值1.29倍和1.84倍。下方：相同的每个哈勃时间复合计数作为H ii分数的函数绘制。与瞬时速率一样，曲线在模拟之间不重叠。电离分数参数化消除了团块增长的大部分差异，但没有消除与电离气体密度相关的差异。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Top: Effective recombination temperature T eff T_{\text{eff}} implied by the full recombination rate, defined via Eq. ( 11 ), as a function of redshift. Bottom: The same temperatures plotted against the global H ii fraction using each simulation’s reionization history. All simulations show a smooth evolution from ( 1.2 (1.2 – 1.3 ) × 10 4 K 1.3)\times 10^{4}\,{K} at high redshift to ( 1.7 (1.7 – 2.3 ) × 10 4 K 2.3)\times 10^{4}\,{K} near z ≃ 5 z\simeq 5 . thesan-1 yields the lowest T eff T_{\text{eff}} , thesan-2 slightly higher values, and lumina the highest over most of the redshift range.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：上方：由完整复合速率隐含的有效复合温度T_eff，通过方程(11)定义，作为红移的函数。下方：相同的温度使用每个模拟的再电离历史相对于全局H ii分数绘制。所有模拟显示从高红移时的(1.2–1.3)×10^4 K到z≃5附近的(1.7–2.3)×10^4 K的平滑演化。thesan-1在大部分红移范围内产生最低的T_eff，thesan-2略高，lumina最高。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Top: Cumulative number of recombinations per hydrogen atom from z max ≃ 15 z_{max}\simeq 15 down to each redshift z z . Bottom: The same cumulative counts plotted against global H ii fraction. Solid curves use 𝒞 rec \mathcal{C}_{\text{rec}} and dashed curves use 𝒞 H ii \mathcal{C}_{\text{{\text{H}\,{ii}}}} . At all stages the 𝒞 H ii \mathcal{C}_{\text{{\text{H}\,{ii}}}} -based integrals exceed their 𝒞 rec \mathcal{C}_{\text{rec}} counterparts, and the difference increases with time. In lumina , by z ≃ 5 z\simeq 5 the corresponding values are 2.164 2.164 and 1.489 1.489 recombinations per hydrogen atom, a ratio of 1.45 1.45 .
figures.caption_zh: 图6：上方：从z_max≃15到每个红移z的每个氢原子的累积复合数。下方：相同的累积计数相对于全局H ii分数绘制。实线使用𝒞_rec，虚线使用𝒞_H ii。在所有阶段，基于𝒞_H ii的积分超过其𝒞_rec对应值，且差异随时间增加。在lumina中，到z≃5时，对应值分别为每个氢原子2.164和1.489次复合，比值为1.45。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Integrated-over-threshold (top) and differential (bottom) overdensity distributions at z ≃ 5.99 z\simeq 5.99 for gas with Δ < 100 \Delta<100 . At these snapshots, the global ionized fractions are x H ​ ii = 0.927 x_{{\text{H}\,\textsc{ii}}}=0.927 , 0.880 0.880 , and 0.843 0.843 for thesan-1 , thesan-2 , and lumina , respectively. Solid curves show the recombination-weighted quantities P rec ​ ( Δ ) P_{\text{rec}}(\Delta) and F rec ​ ( Δ ) F_{\text{rec}}(\Delta) , while dotted curves show the corresponding volume-weighted statistics P V ​ ( Δ ) P_{V}(\Delta) and F V ​ ( Δ ) F_{V}(\Delta) . Here P rec P_{\text{rec}} and P V P_{V} are normalized distributions over overdensity bins, and F rec F_{\text{rec}} and F V F_{V} are their cumulative fractions as the overdensity threshold is increased. Across all three simulations, recombinations are overwhelmingly concentrated in overdense regions: more than 80 % 80\% occur at Δ > 2 \Delta>2 , which occupies less than 10 % 10\% of the IGM volume, and roughly 60 % 60\% originate in the high-density tail Δ > 10 \Delta>10 , which occupies under 1 % 1\% of the volume.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：z≃5.99时过密度Δ<100的气体的阈值以上积分（上方）和微分（下方）过密度分布。在这些快照中，thesan-1、thesan-2和lumina的全局电离分数分别为x_H ii=0.927、0.880和0.843。实线显示复合加权量P_rec(Δ)和F_rec(Δ)，而虚线显示相应的体积加权统计量P_V(Δ)和F_V(Δ)。这里P_rec和P_V是过密度区间上的归一化分布，F_rec和F_V是随着过密度阈值增加时的累积分数。在所有三个模拟中，复合 overwhelmingly 集中在过密区域：超过80%发生在Δ>2的区域，该区域占据IGM体积的不到10%，大约60%源自高密度尾部Δ>10，该区域占据体积的不到1%。

title: PHANTOM: A MATLAB and Octave Toolbox Connecting Linear Field Statistics to Dark Matter Halo Observables
summary: We present phantom (Profile and Halo Analysis for Numerous Theoretical dark Matter Observables), a public MATLAB toolbox and Octave package for calculations that connect the linear density field to dark matter halo observables. The package combines a flexible cosmology module with linear power spectrum, variance, and correlation function solvers, and a halo module that covers mass functions, linear bias, density profiles, and concentration-mass relations for cold, warm, and fuzzy dark matter scenarios. All core routines are validated against the Python package colossus, hmf, and halomod, yielding sub-percent agreement for shared models across distances, power spectra, variance, correlation functions, halo mass functions, and density profiles. Phantom is organised around a cosmology structure that stores background expansion, growth, and linear power-spectrum handles; this object is constructed once and passed through the call graph, so that halo statistics and halo structure calculations remain consistent by design. From this single entry point, users can obtain field statistics (power spectrum, variance, correlation function), halo statistics (mass functions, linear bias), and halo observables (enclosed mass, circular velocity, projected density, and lensing convergence) on arbitrary user-defined grids. The toolbox targets users whose analysis pipelines are written in MATLAB or Octave, where a validated native implementation of these models has been absent. The code is released under the MIT licence at phantom(https://github.com/matc-thaher/PHANTOM).

AI.tldr: PHANTOM是一个用于暗物质晕统计与观测量计算的MATLAB/Octave工具箱，支持冷、温、模糊暗物质模型，已验证与Python工具达到亚百分比一致性。
AI.motivation: MATLAB/Octave生态中缺乏经过验证的原生暗物质晕统计与观测量计算工具，现有Python工具（如colossus、hmf、halomod）无法直接集成到MATLAB/Octave分析流程中。
AI.method: 构建以宇宙学结构为核心的模块化框架，包含线性功率谱、方差、相关函数求解器，以及覆盖冷/温/模糊暗物质的质量函数、线性偏倚、密度轮廓和浓度-质量关系的晕模块，所有核心例程与Python工具交叉验证。
AI.result: 在功率谱、方差、相关函数、晕质量函数和密度轮廓等共享模型上，与colossus、hmf、halomod达到亚百分比级一致性。
AI.conclusion: PHANTOM为MATLAB/Octave用户提供了一个经过验证的、开源的原生暗物质晕计算工具，支持从线性场到晕观测量的完整计算链，代码以MIT许可证发布。

recommendation.reason: 论文主题涉及暗物质晕、质量函数、密度轮廓和透镜会聚，与用户Zotero库中的dark matter、halo、lensing等关键词匹配，但方法上为数值工具开发而非直接科学问题研究，且无核心作者重叠，因此评分中等。
recommendation.topic_fit: 论文主题与用户兴趣中的暗物质、晕、透镜等关键词有较好匹配，但用户更关注强引力透镜、星系形成等具体科学问题，而本文侧重工具开发。
recommendation.method_fit: 论文提供MATLAB/Octave工具箱，用户可能使用类似工具进行数据分析，但方法本身并非用户研究中的核心方法（如强透镜建模、ALMA观测等）。
recommendation.author_fit: 论文作者Mohammad Abu Thaher Chowdhury不在用户核心作者列表中，无直接合作或引用关系。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 论文填补了MATLAB/Octave生态中暗物质晕计算工具的空白，但用户可能更关注科学发现而非工具开发，新颖性一般。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文为数值工具开发，而非用户主要关注的强引力透镜、星系形成等具体科学问题；无核心作者重叠；方法上未涉及用户常用的观测或模拟技术。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们介绍了PHANTOM（Profile and Halo Analysis for Numerous Theoretical dark Matter Observables），一个用于连接线性密度场与暗物质晕观测量的公共MATLAB工具箱和Octave软件包。该软件包结合了灵活的宇宙学模块（包含线性功率谱、方差和相关函数求解器）以及一个涵盖冷暗物质、温暗物质和模糊暗物质场景的质量函数、线性偏差、密度轮廓和质量-浓度关系的晕模块。所有核心程序均与Python软件包colossus、hmf和halomod进行了验证，在距离、功率谱、方差、相关函数、晕质量函数和密度轮廓的共享模型上达到亚百分比一致性。PHANTOM围绕一个存储背景膨胀、增长和线性功率谱句柄的宇宙学结构组织；该对象构建一次并通过调用图传递，从而确保晕统计和晕结构计算在设计上保持一致。通过这一单一入口点，用户可以在任意用户定义的网格上获得场统计量（功率谱、方差、相关函数）、晕统计量（质量函数、线性偏差）以及晕观测量（包围质量、圆周速度、投影密度和透镜会聚）。该工具箱面向分析流程基于MATLAB或Octave的用户，此前这些用户缺乏经过验证的本地实现。代码以MIT许可证发布，网址为phantom(https://github.com/matc-thaher/PHANTOM)。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，PHANTOM为MATLAB/Octave用户提供了一个经过验证的、开源的原生暗物质晕计算工具，支持从线性场到晕观测量的完整计算链，代码以MIT许可证发布。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: phantom software architecture. The cosmology struct (shaded boxes) is constructed once and propagated as a function-handle container throughout the package. Arrows indicate data flow: the linear power spectrum feeds the variance calculation, which in turn drives the halo mass function and bias modules. The concentration–mass relation takes the halo mass and cosmology as inputs and, together with the virial mass, fully specifies the density profile. All profile-derived observables — enclosed mass, circular velocity, surface density, and line-of-sight velocity dispersion — sit at the end of this hierarchy and depend on no module above the profile layer.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：phantom软件架构。宇宙学结构（阴影框）构建一次并作为函数句柄容器在整个软件包中传播。箭头表示数据流：线性功率谱输入方差计算，方差进而驱动晕质量函数和偏差模块。质量-浓度关系以晕质量和宇宙学为输入，与维里质量一起完全指定密度轮廓。所有基于轮廓的观测量——包围质量、圆周速度、表面密度和视线速度弥散——位于此层次结构的末端，不依赖于轮廓层以上的任何模块。

title: Direct Tests of Black Hole Accretion Rate Prescriptions: I. Bondi Accretion at Different Scales
summary: We present spatially resolved parsec-scale measurements of nuclear conditions (gas density and kinetic temperature) relevant for black hole accretion rate predictions in the Seyfert 2 galaxy, NGC 1068. We inject these parameters into the prescription for a Bondi-like accretion model, then compare the resulting accretion rate prediction to the empirical accretion rate derived from hard X-ray observations. Cosmological simulations have spatial resolution ranging from $\sim$10 pc to $\sim$kpc scales, and so for reasonable comparison we test these accretion rate predictions in pixel-sized radial steps out to 500 pc. Compared to warm H$_2$ gas, CO gas is the dominant mass carrier close to the SMBH. We find that the Bondi accretion rate ($\dot{\mathrm{M}}_{\mathrm{Bondi}}$) of cold molecular gas alone (measured using CO) overestimates the true accretion rate by up to 14 dex in a small aperture (r$\lesssim$5 pc) around the black hole, and by at least 8 dex inside large apertures (r$\lesssim$500 pc). These results are the first in a series of direct tests of accretion rate prescriptions, and they suggest that using a Bondi accretion formalism to model supermassive black hole accretion in Seyfert 2 galaxies may lead to overestimated accretion rates in simulations.

AI.tldr: 本文在NGC 1068星系中进行了空间分辨率为秒差距尺度的核区条件测量，发现基于Bondi吸积模型预测的冷分子气体吸积率比实际观测值高8-14个数量级，表明在塞弗特2星系模拟中使用Bondi吸积公式可能导致吸积率被高估。
AI.motivation: 现有宇宙学模拟的空间分辨率（~10 pc到~kpc尺度）无法准确预测黑洞吸积率，需要直接检验Bondi吸积模型在塞弗特2星系中的适用性。
AI.method: 对NGC 1068进行空间分辨率为秒差距尺度的核区气体密度和动力学温度测量，将参数注入Bondi吸积模型，并与硬X射线观测得出的经验吸积率进行比较，在500 pc范围内以像素级径向步长进行测试。
AI.result: CO冷分子气体的Bondi吸积率在5 pc小孔径内高估真实吸积率高达14个数量级，在500 pc大孔径内至少高估8个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 在塞弗特2星系的模拟中使用Bondi吸积形式来描述超大质量黑洞吸积可能导致吸积率被严重高估。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了与黑洞吸积率预测相关的核区条件（气体密度和动力学温度）的空间分辨秒差距尺度测量结果，研究对象为塞弗特2星系NGC 1068。我们将这些参数输入邦迪型吸积模型的预设公式中，然后将所得吸积率预测值与基于硬X射线观测得到的经验吸积率进行比较。宇宙学模拟的空间分辨率范围从约10秒差距到约千秒差距尺度，因此为了进行合理比较，我们在像素大小的径向步长内（最远至500秒差距）测试了这些吸积率预测。与暖H₂气体相比，CO气体是靠近超大质量黑洞的主要质量载体。我们发现，仅使用CO测量的冷分子气体的邦迪吸积率（Ṁ_Bondi）在黑洞周围的小孔径（r≲5秒差距）内高估了真实吸积率高达14个数量级，在大孔径（r≲500秒差距）内至少高估了8个数量级。这些结果是吸积率预设公式直接测试系列中的首个，表明在塞弗特2星系的模拟中使用邦迪吸积形式来描述超大质量黑洞吸积可能导致吸积率被高估。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论为：在塞弗特2星系的模拟中使用邦迪吸积形式来描述超大质量黑洞吸积可能导致吸积率被严重高估。

The very small, magenta circle in the bottom left represents the beam size of the ALMA data (20 × \times 20 mas). All three images show flux peaks at the AGN’s location and both the CO and H 2 maps have enhanced emission in the CND ring. The red circle in the H 2 1-0 S(1) moment map represents the aperture in which T kin is calculated in Figure 3 .

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: X-ray and (Cold-derived) Bondi accretion rates as a function of radius over which nuclear parameters are measured. Color bars and ranges displayed to the right denote uncertainties on each X-ray measurement. Regardless of which gas component is used to estimate M ˙ Bondi \dot{{M}}_{{Bondi}} , the Bondi prescription overestimates M ˙ BH \dot{{M}}_{{BH}} by orders of magnitude, and is above the Eddington rate (orange line, with radiative efficiency ϵ \epsilon = 0.1). For the cold gas case, which represents the majority of gas available for accretion in NGC 1068, Bondi overpredicts the accretion rate by between 10 and 14 orders of magnitude.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：X射线和（冷气体衍生的）邦迪吸积率作为核区参数测量半径的函数。右侧显示的色条和范围表示每个X射线测量的不确定性。无论使用哪种气体成分来估计Ṁ_Bondi，邦迪预设公式都会高估Ṁ_BH数个数量级，并且高于爱丁顿吸积率（橙色线，辐射效率ε=0.1）。对于冷气体情况（代表NGC 1068中可用于吸积的大部分气体），邦迪吸积率高估了吸积率10到14个数量级。

title: Impact of inhomogeneous curvature on growth rate measurements from magnitude fluctuations
comment: 14 pages, 5 figures, Submitted to the Open Journal of Astrophysics
summary: Our interpretation of current cosmological observations rests on the assumptions of homogeneity and isotropy, leading to uniform background curvature and expansion characterised by the Friedmann-Lemaître-Robertson-Walker (FLRW) spacetime metric. However, the large-scale structure of the Universe is non-uniform in detail, inducing inhomogeneous curvature and scale factor variations. In this paper, we use numerical cosmological simulations generated in full General Relativity to study the impact of inhomogeneous spacetime on the magnitude fluctuations of distant objects, focusing on their use as a probe of the growth rate of cosmic structure. We quantify the distortions in the magnitude correlation spectrum as a function of angular scale and redshift, and use these distortions to infer the systematic offset in the growth rate measurement. We find that at $z \lesssim 0.2$, the systematic offset in growth rate measurements between the full numerical relativity and FLRW treatments is sub-dominant to the statistical error of current datasets, confirming that FLRW modelling is adequate for current low-redshift peculiar velocity experiments. Future datasets extending to higher redshift may require theoretical models that additionally incorporate the contributions of gravitational lensing and inhomogeneous curvature.

AI.tldr: 本文利用广义相对论框架下的宇宙学数值模拟，研究了非均匀时空对遥远天体亮度涨落的影响，发现FLRW模型在低红移（z≲0.2）下对生长率测量的偏差小于当前统计误差，验证了其适用性，但未来高红移数据需考虑引力透镜和非均匀曲率效应。
AI.motivation: 当前宇宙学观测基于均匀各向同性的FLRW度规假设，但实际大尺度结构存在非均匀性，可能影响对宇宙结构生长率的测量精度，因此需要量化这一偏差。
AI.method: 使用完全广义相对论的数值宇宙学模拟，研究非均匀时空对遥远天体亮度涨落的影响，量化不同角尺度和红移下的亮度相关谱畸变，并据此推断生长率测量的系统偏差。
AI.result: 在z≲0.2时，全相对论处理与FLRW处理之间的生长率测量系统偏差小于当前数据集的统计误差；未来高红移数据集需纳入引力透镜和非均匀曲率的贡献。
AI.conclusion: 当前FLRW建模对低红移本动速度实验是充分的，但未来更高红移观测需要更复杂的理论模型。

recommendation.reason: 论文主题涉及引力透镜和宇宙结构生长率，与用户Zotero库中的引力透镜、透镜等关键词有一定重叠，但整体研究问题（非均匀曲率对生长率测量的影响）与用户核心兴趣（暗物质、强引力透镜、高红移星系、星际介质等）偏离较大，且无共同作者，方法上使用广义相对论数值模拟而非用户常用的观测或模拟手段，因此相关性较低。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们对当前宇宙学观测的解释依赖于均匀性和各向同性的假设，这导致了由弗里德曼-勒梅特-罗伯逊-沃克时空度规所描述的均匀背景曲率和膨胀。然而，宇宙的大尺度结构在细节上是不均匀的，这导致了非均匀曲率和尺度因子的变化。在本文中，我们使用在完整广义相对论框架下生成的数值宇宙学模拟，研究非均匀时空对遥远天体星等涨落的影响，重点关注其作为宇宙结构增长速率探针的应用。我们量化了星等相关谱随角尺度和红移的畸变，并利用这些畸变推断增长速率测量中的系统偏移。我们发现，在红移z ≲ 0.2时，完整数值相对论与FLRW处理之间的增长速率测量系统偏移小于当前数据集的统计误差，这证实了FLRW建模对于当前低红移本动速度实验是充分的。未来扩展到更高红移的数据集可能需要额外考虑引力透镜和非均匀曲率贡献的理论模型。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论为：当前FLRW建模对低红移本动速度实验是充分的，但未来更高红移观测需要更复杂的理论模型。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Projections of the magnitude fluctuation field δ ​ m \delta m at redshifts z = 0.1 z=0.1 , 0.3 0.3 , and 0.5 0.5 (top to bottom). The left column shows the full NR measurement δ ​ m NR \delta m_{NR} , and the right column shows the velocity-only values δ ​ m vel \delta m_{vel} calculated using the source and observer velocities. At z = 0.1 z=0.1 the two maps are visually similar, with large-scale features driven dominantly by velocities. At higher redshifts, the amplitude of the fluctuations decreases and the maps become increasingly distinct, with smaller scale structure formation apparent in δ ​ m NR \delta m_{NR} and absent from the δ ​ m vel \delta m_{vel} maps, reflecting the growing contribution of gravitational lensing to the signal.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：红移z=0.1、0.3和0.5（从上到下）的星等涨落场δm的投影。左列显示完整的数值相对论测量δm_NR，右列显示仅使用源和观测者速度计算的速度贡献值δm_vel。在z=0.1时，两幅图在视觉上相似，大尺度特征主要由速度驱动。在更高红移时，涨落幅度减小，两幅图差异增大，δm_NR中可见更小尺度的结构形成，而δm_vel图中则没有，这反映了引力透镜对信号的贡献逐渐增加。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: The angular power spectrum of magnitude fluctuations, C ℓ δ ​ m ​ δ ​ m C_{\ell}^{\delta m\,\delta m} , at a range of redshifts from z = 0.1 z=0.1 to z = 0.6 z=0.6 . The green points show the full NR simulation measurement ( C ℓ , NR C_{\ell,{NR}} ), the purple points show the velocity-only measurements ( C ℓ , vel C_{\ell,{vel}} ), and the blue and orange curves show the FLRW model prediction due to velocities and lensing, respectively. The errors in the measurements are determined as the standard deviation across 20 observer positions. At low redshift, the full NR and velocity-only measurements agree closely. At higher redshift, the NR power spectra exceeds the velocity-only measurements due to the effects of gravitational lensing, with the excess appearing first at high ℓ \ell and extending to all scales by z ≳ 0.6 z\gtrsim 0.6 . The dipole signature due to observer motion is visible at ℓ = 1 \ell=1 . The vertical dashed line shows a multipole ℓ ∼ k ​ χ ​ ( z ) \ell\sim k\,\chi(z) corresponding to a constant physical wavenumber k = 0.09 ​ h k=0.09\,h Mpc -1 , which represents the power spectrum cutoff in the initial data.

At z ≤ 0.2 z\leq 0.2 the systematic offset is negligible ( < 1 % <1\% ) compared to the statistical error ( 3 3 – 4 % 4\% ). The systematic offset grows rapidly with redshift, reaching ∼ 8 % {\sim}8\% at z = 0.3 z=0.3 , ∼ 39 % {\sim}39\% at z = 0.4 z=0.4 , and exceeding 100 % 100\% by z = 0.5 z=0.5 , while the statistical error increases more gradually. title: The three-dimensional shapes of the galaxy cluster intracluster medium in eRASS1
summary:
The three-dimensional shapes of clusters are important for understanding the astrophysics of the clusters and as a probe in cosmological studies. We estimate the most probable three-dimensional shape of galaxy clusters in the first eROSITA All-sky survey eRASS1 using stereology. Our sample is the largest well-defined sample of clusters, and the most probable shape estimated using our method can be used as a prior for cluster shape models in cosmological, cluster, and weak lensing studies.
  The first all-sky survey with SRG/ eROSITA resulted in a sample of approximately 12,000 optically confirmed galaxy groups and clusters. We used a well-defined subsample of 3254 clusters from the eRASS1 survey and estimated the most probable shape of the clusters by constraining the probability density function (PDF) of the ellipticity of the clusters. We simulated the projected appearance of clusters with a distribution of three-dimensional shapes (prolate and oblate) and obtained the distribution of their ellipticity. This distribution was then compared with the measured distribution of ellipticities from the eRASS1 cluster sample to infer the three-dimensional shapes consistent with the data. We used Monte Carlo methods to estimate the most probable axial ratios l, w, where l $\equiv$ L/T ,w $\equiv$ W/T , and L, W, T are major, intermediate, and minor axes of the cluster. We did not require any additional probe (optical, SZ, etc.) to constrain the probable shape of the clusters.
  We describe the ellipticity PDF of the eRASS1 clusters with a normal distribution mean ($μ$) = 0.79 and a standard deviation ($σ$) = 0.25. The most probable shape of the clusters in our eRASS1 subsample is estimated to be (l, w) = (1.51 $\pm$ 0.27, 1.17 $\pm$ 0.27), with prolate shapes being preferred over oblate shapes.

AI.tldr: 基于eRASS1巡天中3254个星系团样本，利用体视学方法估计星系团最可能的三维形状为(l, w) = (1.51±0.27, 1.17±0.27)，长椭球形状优于扁椭球形状。
AI.motivation: 星系团的三维形状对于理解团的天体物理过程以及作为宇宙学研究中的探针具有重要意义。
AI.method: 利用eRASS1巡天中3254个光学确认的星系团子样本，通过蒙特卡洛方法模拟三维形状（长椭球和扁椭球）的投影外观，将其椭圆率分布与观测的椭圆率分布进行比较，从而约束最可能的三维轴比(l, w)。
AI.result: eRASS1星系团的椭圆率PDF呈正态分布（μ=0.79, σ=0.25）；最可能的三维形状轴比为(l, w) = (1.51±0.27, 1.17±0.27)，且长椭球形状优于扁椭球。
AI.conclusion: 该方法不需要额外探针（光学、SZ等）即可约束星系团的三维形状，所得结果可作为宇宙学、星系团及弱引力透镜研究中团形状模型的先验信息。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 星系团的三维形状对于理解其天体物理学特性以及作为宇宙学研究中的探针具有重要意义。我们利用体视学方法估算了首次eROSITA全天巡天（eRASS1）中星系团的最可能三维形状。我们的样本是最大且定义明确的星系团样本，通过该方法估算的最可能形状可作为宇宙学、星系团及弱引力透镜研究中团形状模型的先验信息。SRG/eROSITA的首次全天巡天获得了约12,000个经光学确认的星系群和星系团样本。我们使用了eRASS1巡天中一个定义明确的子样本（包含3254个星系团），通过约束星系团椭圆率的概率密度函数（PDF）来估算其最可能形状。我们模拟了具有三维形状分布（长球和扁球）的星系团的投影外观，并获得了其椭圆率分布。然后将该分布与eRASS1星系团样本的实测椭圆率分布进行比较，以推断与数据一致的三维形状。我们使用蒙特卡洛方法估算了最可能的轴比l和w，其中l ≡ L/T，w ≡ W/T，L、W、T分别为星系团的长轴、中间轴和短轴。我们不需要任何额外探针（光学、SZ等）来约束星系团的可能形状。我们描述了eRASS1星系团椭圆率PDF，其服从均值为0.79、标准差为0.25的正态分布。eRASS1子样本中星系团的最可能形状估算为(l, w) = (1.51 ± 0.27, 1.17 ± 0.27)，且长球形状优于扁球形状。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，该方法不需要额外探针（光学、SZ等）即可约束星系团的三维形状，所得结果可作为宇宙学、星系团及弱引力透镜研究中团形状模型的先验信息。

title: Constraints on Cosmic Strings from the Curl-Mode CMB Lensing Power Spectrum measured by ACT DR6
summary: A network of cosmic strings is one of the few well-motivated cosmological sources of vector and tensor metric perturbations on the largest observable scales. Such perturbations imprint a characteristic curl component in the deflection angle of cosmic microwave background (CMB) photons that, unlike the scalar lensing potential, vanishes for adiabatic density fluctuations at linear order. We exploit the curl-mode lensing reconstruction released as part of the Atacama Cosmology Telescope (ACT) Data Release~6 (DR6), based on five seasons of temperature and polarization data covering $9400~\mathrm{deg}^2$ of sky, to set new constraints on the dimensionless string tension $Gμ$ and the inter-commutation (reconnection) probability $P$. Modelling the string-induced curl power spectrum within the velocity-dependent one-scale framework, we obtain a $2σ$ upper bound on the combination $GμP^{-1}\le 3.5\times 10^{-5}$ in the small-$P$ regime, and $Gμ\le 5.0\times 10^{-5}$ at $2σ$ assuming the canonical Nambu-Goto value $P=1$. Combining the ACT DR6 curl bandpowers with the Planck 2013 curl-mode reconstruction, which extends down to $L_{\rm min}=2$, tightens these bounds to $GμP^{-1}\le 3.2\times 10^{-5}$ and $Gμ\le 4.3\times 10^{-5}$ ($2σ$). These represent the tightest constraints on cosmic strings derived from the curl-mode CMB lensing power spectrum to date. Using the ACT data alone, compared to the ACT 2008-season analysis, the ACT DR6 constraint on $GμP^{-1}$ is nearly an order of magnitude tighter.

AI.tldr: 利用ACT DR6和Planck 2013的CMB curl模透镜重建数据，对宇宙弦的无量纲张力Gμ和重连概率P给出了迄今最严格的限制，得到GμP⁻¹≤3.2×10⁻⁵（2σ）的联合约束。
AI.motivation: 宇宙弦是最大可观测尺度上矢量和张量度规扰动的重要宇宙学源，其会在CMB光子的偏折角中留下特征旋量分量，而标量绝热密度涨落在线性阶不会产生该信号，因此curl模为探测宇宙弦提供了独特窗口。
AI.method: 利用ACT DR6的curl模透镜重建（覆盖9400 deg²的天空，基于五个季节的温度和偏振数据），以及Planck 2013的curl模重建数据，在速度依赖的单尺度框架下对弦诱导的curl功率谱进行建模，约束Gμ和P。
AI.result: ACT DR6单独给出GμP⁻¹≤3.5×10⁻⁵（小P区域，2σ）和P=1时Gμ≤5.0×10⁻⁵（2σ）；联合Planck数据后约束收紧至GμP⁻¹≤3.2×10⁻⁵和Gμ≤4.3×10⁻⁵（2σ），相比ACT 2008分析提升近一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 这是迄今从curl模CMB透镜功率谱得到的对宇宙弦最严格的约束，证明了多数据集联合分析在宇宙弦探测中的有效性。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 宇宙弦网络是最大可观测尺度上少数几个动机良好的矢量与张量度规扰动宇宙学来源之一。此类扰动会在宇宙微波背景（CMB）光子的偏折角中留下特征性的旋量分量，与标量透镜势不同，该分量在绝热密度扰动的线性阶为零。我们利用阿塔卡马宇宙学望远镜（ACT）第六次数据发布（DR6）中基于五个季节的温度与极化数据（覆盖9400平方度天区）释放的旋量模透镜重建，对无量纲弦张力Gμ和互连（重连）概率P设定了新约束。在速度依赖的单尺度框架内对弦诱导的旋量功率谱进行建模，我们在小P区域得到组合参数GμP⁻¹的2σ上限为≤3.5×10⁻⁵，并假设标准纳姆布-后藤值P=1时得到Gμ≤5.0×10⁻⁵（2σ）。将ACT DR6旋量能带功率与普朗克2013年旋量模重建（延伸至最小多极矩L_min=2）结合，这些约束收紧为GμP⁻¹≤3.2×10⁻⁵和Gμ≤4.3×10⁻⁵（2σ）。这是迄今从旋量模CMB透镜功率谱得到的对宇宙弦最严格的约束。仅使用ACT数据，与ACT 2008季节分析相比，ACT DR6对GμP⁻¹的约束几乎严格了一个数量级。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，这是迄今从旋量模CMB透镜功率谱得到的对宇宙弦最严格的约束，证明了多数据集联合分析在宇宙弦探测中的有效性。

title: Impact of lensing magnification on the power spectrum turnover
summary: The turnover scale $k_0$ of the matter power spectrum -- and consequently of the standard galaxy power spectrum monopole -- encodes a fundamental signature of matter-radiation equality and constitutes an important standard ruler independent of baryon acoustic oscillations. In principle, we can detect the turnover at multiple redshifts and amplify the signal by stacking redshift bins. However, in spectroscopic surveys reaching high redshifts, such as the Euclid H$α$ survey and the proposed MegaMapper Lyman-break galaxy survey, the monopole of the observed galaxy power spectrum receives a scale-dependent correction from lensing magnification. This can modify the signal shape and shift the turnover scale, undermining its use as a standard ruler. Using mock surveys similar to Euclid and MegaMapper, we forecast this shift and the consequent bias in the turnover scale that is recovered from the mock data. The shift in the turnover scale grows with redshift, leading to a maximum bias of $\sim 0.4σ$ (Euclid-like) and $\sim 3.6σ$ (MegaMapper-like). To avoid a bias $>1σ$, the maximum redshift for a MegaMapper-like survey is $z\approx 2.9$. Data in the remaining range $2.9\lesssim z\le 5$ does not directly provide a reliable recovery of the intrinsic turnover. In fact, we find that the turnover vanishes in a MegaMapper-like survey for $z\gtrsim 3.7$. Our results show that the lensing correction to the monopole should be included and carefully modelled when surveys are used to measure the cosmological turnover at high redshifts.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在Euclid和MegaMapper等高红移巡天中，透镜放大效应会对星系功率谱单极的拐点尺度产生系统偏移，最高导致MegaMapper巡天中约3.6σ的偏差，并可能使拐点在z≳3.7时完全消失，因此需要仔细建模透镜修正才能将拐点用作标准尺。
AI.motivation: 物质功率谱的拐点尺度是独立于重子声学振荡的重要标准尺，但高红移巡天的透镜放大效应会修正观测功率谱单极的形状，可能偏移拐点位置，影响其作为标准尺的可靠性。本文旨在量化该效应导致的系统误差。
AI.method: 使用类似Euclid Hα巡天和MegaMapper Lyman-break星系巡天的模拟数据，预测透镜放大效应引起的拐点尺度偏移，并计算对拐点恢复造成的偏差量。
AI.result: 拐点尺度偏移随红移增大，Euclid-like最大偏差约0.4σ，MegaMapper-like最大偏差约3.6σ。为避免>1σ偏差，MegaMapper巡天最大红移应≤2.9；在z≳3.7时拐点完全消失。
AI.conclusion: 高红移巡天中透镜修正不可忽略，必须将其纳入模型才能可靠测量宇宙学拐点；否则部分红移数据无法直接恢复原始拐点。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 物质功率谱（以及标准星系功率谱单极）的拐点尺度 $k_0$ 编码了物质-辐射等时的基本特征，构成独立于重子声学振荡的重要标准尺。原则上，我们可以在多个红移处探测该拐点，并通过叠加红移区间增强信号。然而，在达到高红移的光谱巡天中，例如 Euclid H$α$ 巡天和拟议的 MegaMapper 莱曼断裂星系巡天，观测到的星系功率谱单极会受到透镜放大效应的尺度依赖修正。这会改变信号形状并移动拐点尺度，削弱其作为标准尺的用途。利用类似 Euclid 和 MegaMapper 的模拟巡天，我们预测了这种移动以及由此导致的从模拟数据中恢复的拐点尺度的偏差。拐点尺度的移动随红移增加而增大，导致最大偏差约为 $0.4σ$（类似 Euclid）和 $3.6σ$（类似 MegaMapper）。为避免偏差 $>1σ$，类似 MegaMapper 巡天的最大红移为 $z\approx 2.9$。剩余范围 $2.9\lesssim z\le 5$ 的数据不能直接可靠地恢复固有拐点。事实上，我们发现对于 $z\gtrsim 3.7$ 的类似 MegaMapper 巡天，拐点消失。我们的结果表明，当利用巡天测量高红移处的宇宙学拐点时，必须包含并仔细建模对单极的透镜修正。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要的结论：高红移巡天中透镜修正不可忽略，必须将其纳入模型才能可靠测量宇宙学拐点；否则部分红移数据无法直接恢复原始拐点。

title: CMBComp: A Simple and Accurate Compressed CMB Likelihood for Dark Energy, Curvature, and Massive Neutrinos
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures, 3 tables. Comments are welcome. Github URL: https://github.com/Amoghsriv/CMBComp
summary: We present CMBComp, a compact and accurate compressed cosmic microwave background (CMB) likelihood that captures the dominant geometric information of the full CMB likelihood derived from the combined SPT-3G D1 + ACT DR6 + Planck PR3 primary CMB anisotropy + Planck PR4/NPIPE CMB-lensing dataset, which we collectively refer to as SPA. The compression is fast to evaluate and trivial to implement in standard inference pipelines. We construct and validate it in five model spaces: the spatially flat cosmological-constant model ($Λ$CDM), and its dynamical-dark-energy ($w_0w_a$CDM), massive-neutrino ($νΛ$CDM), non-flat ($oΛ$CDM), and joint massive-neutrino--dynamical-dark-energy ($νw_0 w_a$CDM) extensions. Five compressed likelihoods are introduced, corresponding to two three-parameter compressions for the dark-energy sector (CMB-3 for $Λ$CDM and CMB-3w for $w_0w_a$CDM), two four-parameter compressions for the neutrino sector (CMB-4$ν$ for $νΛ$CDM and CMB-4$ν$w for $νw_0 w_a$CDM), and a four-parameter curvature compression (CMB-4k for $oΛ$CDM). Combining each compressed likelihood with the DESI DR2 baryon acoustic oscillation (BAO) data, we demonstrate that the resulting posteriors agree to high precision with those obtained from the corresponding full-CMB chains. CMBComp is therefore particularly well suited to cosmological inference for models that modify the late-time expansion history, enabling accurate CMB constraints to be incorporated into new analyses with minimal computational overhead and without reliance on a full Boltzmann-solver-based inference pipeline. The compressed likelihood files and example notebooks accompanying CMBComp are made publicly available at https://github.com/Amoghsriv/CMBComp.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CMBComp，一种快速、精确的压缩CMB似然函数，在五个宇宙学模型空间中验证，并与DESI DR2 BAO数据结合可高精度复现全CMB链的后验结果，代码已开源。
AI.motivation: 传统的基于完整玻尔兹曼求解器的CMB似然推断计算开销大，尤其在对晚期膨胀历史进行修改的模型分析中，需要一种轻量级、易集成且保持高精度的压缩似然替代方案。
AI.method: 基于SPT-3G D1 + ACT DR6 + Planck PR3主各向异性 + Planck PR4/NPIPE CMB透镜数据的联合似然，构建针对五个模型空间（ΛCDM、w0waCDM、νΛCDM、oΛCDM、νw0waCDM）的五种压缩似然（CMB-3、CMB-3w、CMB-4ν、CMB-4k、CMB-4νw），并与DESI DR2 BAO数据结合验证。
AI.result: 五种压缩似然在与DESI DR2 BAO数据联合后，得到的后验分布与全CMB链的结果高度一致，验证了压缩的高精度与可靠性。
AI.conclusion: CMBComp特别适合修改晚期膨胀历史的宇宙学模型推断，能以极小计算开销提供精确的CMB约束，无需依赖完整的玻尔兹曼求解器推断管线。

recommendation.reason: 论文主题为CMB压缩似然与宇宙学参数推断，与用户Zotero库中强引力透镜、暗物质、星系形成等核心主题仅有非常间接的关联（如暗能量与暗物质概念不同，CMB透镜与强引力透镜方法差异大），且无共同作者，故评分较低。

recommendation.method_fit: 低：用户库常用方法为强引力透镜建模、ALMA/JWST观测、尘埃偏振等，本文方法为CMB似然压缩与BAO联合推断，方法学上无交集。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们提出了CMBComp，一个紧凑且精确的压缩宇宙微波背景（CMB）似然函数，它捕捉了来自SPT-3G D1 + ACT DR6 + Planck PR3原初CMB各向异性 + Planck PR4/NPIPE CMB透镜组合数据集（统称为SPA）的完整CMB似然函数的主要几何信息。该压缩易于评估，且易于在标准推断流程中实现。我们在五个模型空间中构建并验证了它：空间平坦的宇宙学常数模型（ΛCDM），及其动态暗能量（w₀wₐCDM）、大质量中微子（νΛCDM）、非平坦（oΛCDM）以及联合大质量中微子-动态暗能量（νw₀wₐCDM）扩展。引入了五个压缩似然函数，分别对应暗能量部分的两个三参数压缩（用于ΛCDM的CMB-3和用于w₀wₐCDM的CMB-3w）、中微子部分的两个四参数压缩（用于νΛCDM的CMB-4ν和用于νw₀wₐCDM的CMB-4νw），以及一个四参数曲率压缩（用于oΛCDM的CMB-4k）。将每个压缩似然函数与DESI DR2重子声学振荡（BAO）数据结合，我们证明所得后验分布与从相应完整CMB链获得的后验分布高度一致。因此，CMBComp特别适用于修改晚期膨胀历史的宇宙学模型推断，能够以最小的计算开销将精确的CMB约束纳入新分析中，而无需依赖完整的玻尔兹曼求解器推断管线。压缩似然函数文件和示例笔记本随CMBComp公开发布于https://github.com/Amoghsriv/CMBComp。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，CMBComp特别适合修改晚期膨胀历史的宇宙学模型推断，能以极小计算开销提供精确的CMB约束，无需依赖完整的玻尔兹曼求解器推断管线。

title: A comparative study of O, Ne, Cl, and Ar in Hii regions and PNe of the Galactic disk: Temporal evolution of radial gradients?
comment: 14 pages, 5 figures, 1 table. Additional four long tables in the appendix (16 pages). Accepted for publication in MNRAS
summary: (Abridged) We compare the radial abundance gradients of O, Ne, Cl, and Ar using a sample of 42 HII regions and 176 planetary nebulae (PNe) from the DESIRED catalogue in the Galactic disk, comprising the highest-quality observations currently available and presenting the first gradient analysis for this dataset. For all objects, two sets of chemical abundances were compiled: one derived from collisionally excited lines (CELs) and another incorporating the temperature fluctuation parameter (t^2). Oxygen abundances were corrected for dust depletion, and HII region results were compared with Cepheid stars, which trace the present-day interstellar medium. PNe distances were compiled from recent literature, excluding bulge or halo objects to ensure a disk-only sample. All gradients are statistically significant (p < 0.05), except for Cl and Ar in HII regions. The O/H gradients from HII regions and Cepheids are consistent when t^2 is included, underscoring the importance of accounting for temperature inhomogeneities in nebular analyses. The O and Ne gradients traced by older objects are flatter than the present-day gradient by -0.028 +- 0.008 dex kpc-1 on average from both RLs and CELs. This could indicate a temporal steepening of the Galactic abundance gradient; however, this behavior is not reproduced by chemical evolution models, suggesting additional physical processes are at play. The most plausible explanation is that our PNe sample has been strongly affected by radial migration. Under this interpretation, the PNe gradient cannot reliably trace past abundance gradients, but provides a valuable constraint on radial stellar migration, offering important input for chemo-dynamical models of the Galactic disk and for hydrodynamical simulations.

AI.tldr: 本文利用42个HII区（HII regions）和176个行星状星云（PNe）的高质量观测数据，首次分析了银河系盘面中O、Ne、Cl、Ar元素的径向丰度梯度。研究发现：当考虑温度涨落参数（t²）时，HII区与造父变星的氧丰度梯度一致；而由较老天体（PNe）追踪的O和Ne梯度比当前梯度更平坦，可能表明银河系丰度梯度随时间变陡。但化学演化模型无法重现这一现象，最可能的解释是PNe样本受到径向迁移的强烈影响，因此PNe梯度不能可靠地追溯过去的丰度梯度，但可为径向恒星迁移提供重要约束。
AI.motivation: 通过比较HII区（年轻天体）和行星状星云（年老天体）的化学丰度梯度，探究银河系盘面化学丰度梯度随时间的变化，并验证是否与化学演化模型一致。
AI.method: 使用DESIRED星表中42个HII区和176个PNe的高质量光谱数据，分别基于碰撞激发线（CELs）和考虑温度涨落参数（t²）的方法计算两种化学丰度；对氧丰度进行尘埃消耗修正；将HII区结果与造父变星对比；排除银晕和核球天体，仅保留盘面样本进行统计分析。
AI.result: 所有梯度在统计上显著（p<0.05），但HII区中的Cl和Ar除外。当包含t²参数时，HII区和造父变星的O/H梯度一致。较老天体（PNe）的O和Ne梯度比当前梯度平坦约-0.028±0.008 dex kpc⁻¹。化学演化模型无法重现这一变陡趋势。
AI.conclusion: PNe样本可能受到径向迁移的强烈影响，因此其梯度不能可靠地追溯过去丰度梯度，但为径向恒星迁移提供了有价值的约束，可为银河系盘面化学动力学模型和流体动力学模拟提供重要输入。

recommendation.reason: 论文主题为银河系盘面化学丰度梯度，与用户Zotero库中强引力透镜、暗物质、高红移星系等核心方向不匹配。虽然涉及星际介质和尘埃，但属于宽泛领域重叠，缺乏核心科学问题、方法或作者的直接关联。

recommendation.method_fit: 不匹配。用户库主要使用引力透镜、ALMA/JWST观测等方法，而本文采用光学光谱丰度分析，方法差异大。
recommendation.author_fit: 不匹配。论文作者均不在用户核心作者列表中。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 中等。论文首次对DESIRED星表进行梯度分析，但研究问题与用户兴趣方向偏离较大。

artifacts.abstract_zh: （摘要）我们利用银河系盘面中42个HII区域和176个行星状星云（PNe）的样本，比较了O、Ne、Cl和Ar的径向丰度梯度。这些数据来自DESIRED星表，代表了当前可用的最高质量观测，并首次对该数据集进行了梯度分析。对于所有天体，我们汇编了两套化学丰度：一套来自碰撞激发线（CELs），另一套则包含了温度涨落参数（t²）。氧丰度已针对尘埃消耗进行了修正，HII区域的结果与代表当前星际介质的造父变星进行了比较。PNe的距离来自近期文献，并排除了核球或晕族天体，以确保样本仅包含盘面天体。所有梯度在统计上均显著（p < 0.05），但HII区域中的Cl和Ar除外。当包含t²时，HII区域和造父变星的O/H梯度一致，这强调了在星云分析中考虑温度不均匀性的重要性。由较老天体示踪的O和Ne梯度比当前梯度更平坦，平均差异为-0.028 ± 0.008 dex kpc⁻¹（基于RLs和CELs）。这可能表明银河系丰度梯度随时间变陡；然而，化学演化模型并未重现这一行为，表明存在额外的物理过程。最合理的解释是，我们的PNe样本受到了径向迁移的强烈影响。在这种解释下，PNe梯度不能可靠地追溯过去的丰度梯度，但为径向恒星迁移提供了有价值的约束，为银河系盘面的化学动力学模型和流体动力学模拟提供了重要输入。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的结论：PNe样本可能受到径向迁移的强烈影响，因此其梯度不能可靠地追溯过去丰度梯度，但为径向恒星迁移提供了有价值的约束，可为银河系盘面化学动力学模型和流体动力学模拟提供重要输入。

title: Dynamical evolution of dark matter subhaloes in the Milky Way: role of the Galactic disc
comment: 15 pages, 11 figures, 2 tables and 1 appendix, submitted to MNRAS
summary: Dark matter (DM) subhaloes orbiting inside the Milky Way (MW) are promising targets for DM searches, and reliable predictions for the detectability and spatial distribution of their signals are crucial for probing the nature of DM. Recent work showed that tidal forces from the baryonic components of the MW boost the efficiency of subhalo mass-loss, although the underlying physical processes remain insufficiently understood. This study focuses on clarifying the role of the Galactic disc. By using $N$-body simulations, we examine how the dynamical evolution of subhaloes varies with the inclination angle between their orbits and the Galactic disc. Subhaloes whose orbits are inclined by only a few degrees with respect to the Galactic disc pass through it quickly, which enhances tidal shock heating and leads to a pronounced increase in mass-loss efficiency. In contrast, when a subhalo orbit is exactly coplanar with the Galactic disc, adiabatic shielding suppresses the energy input from tidal shocks, resulting in a lower mass-loss efficiency. Tidal stripping lowers the DM density within subhaloes, thereby attenuating the luminosity of their DM signals. Consequently, we expect that subhaloes located at distances of $\sim 0.3$--$2$\,kpc from the Galactic disc plane emit only weak signals, whereas those remaining embedded in the disc are more promising candidates for indirect DM detection, provided that contamination from baryonic emission sources can be carefully modelled and subtracted. Although their mass-loss histories differ significantly, the structural evolution of subhaloes is still well described by the tidal tracks reported in the literature.

AI.tldr: 本文通过N体模拟研究了银河系盘对暗物质子结构（subhalo）轨道倾角的影响，发现小倾角轨道会增强潮汐冲击加热，提高质量损失效率；共面轨道则因绝热屏蔽效应抑制能量注入，使子结构保持更致密，从而成为间接暗物质探测的更优候选者。
AI.motivation: 银河系重子成分（特别是盘）产生的潮汐力会显著影响暗物质子结构的质量损失效率，但背后的物理机制尚不清晰。本文旨在澄清银河系盘在其中的具体作用。
AI.method: 利用N体模拟，系统比较不同轨道倾角（相对于银河系盘）下暗物质子结构的动力学演化过程，分析倾角对潮汐冲击加热、质量损失效率及密度分布的影响。
AI.result: 小倾角（几度）轨道因快速穿过盘面，增强潮汐冲击加热，质量损失效率显著提高；共面轨道因绝热屏蔽效应，能量注入被抑制，质量损失效率较低。位于盘面外0.3-2 kpc的子结构信号较弱，而盘内子结构是更优的间接探测目标。
AI.conclusion: 尽管质量损失历史差异显著，子结构的结构演化仍可用文献中的潮汐轨迹描述。盘内子结构是更 promising 的间接暗物质探测候选者，但需谨慎建模并扣除重子辐射源的污染。

recommendation.reason: 论文主题为银河系暗物质子结构的动力学演化，与用户Zotero库中的暗物质、银河系等关键词部分匹配，但用户核心兴趣集中在强引力透镜、高红移星系、星际介质和JWST/ALMA观测，而本文聚焦于银河系内暗物质子结构的潮汐演化，科学问题和方法与用户主要研究方向差异较大，且无核心作者重叠。

recommendation.method_fit: 不匹配：用户库主要使用引力透镜、JWST/ALMA观测和模拟，本文采用N体模拟研究银河系内子结构，方法类型不同。
